judge_result.short_rationale: Required action to rinse skin immediately with plenty of water for 15–20 minutes is present, but it is not first. The answer adds unsupported instructions to remove clothing, use soap, cover with cloth/bandage, avoid ointment, and go to hospital immediately with the bottle. Source only supports immediate water rinse and medical attention if symptoms persist or exposure was substantial.
